title: デビュー戦の後に・幕開け、ここから

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The moment I rounded the fourth corner and
came in front of the stands, I honestly thought my
legs were going to give out.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The crowd was roaring, their eyes all on me. I
could feel the voices—so many voices—closing
in...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I thought that maybe I hadn't made any progress
at all, but then...)
choice_data_list: Dober! Stay strong! Show 'em what you've got!
Dober! Stay strong! Show 'em what you've got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... can do this! Hryahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will! Watch me! Hryahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(My vision is blurry, my legs won't stop shaking,
and my heart feels like it's about to explode!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But that just proves... how hard I ran!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I ran with all my strength! In an actual race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not that big a deal... This is just the first
step, nothing to get that excited over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is just my debut! It's embarrassing to see
you get so excited over me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Still, um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sorry. I don't mean that. I'm... actually
really happy too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was able to finish that race without any regrets
because of you, so... thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I heard you cheering for me... Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Afterward, while packing up our things...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hello, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Congratulations on your debut!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bright... Thank you. I couldn't have done it
without you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You were so cool out there, Dober! We could feel
your muscles pulsing from the stands!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-you don't mean literally, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you, though. I appreciate you saying
that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That was a fine run, Dober. I hope you'll continue
to do your best in the races ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I hope you'll come cheer me on when it's
my turn to debut, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sure to show you a breathtaking race
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Of course, I'll be there. Train hard, okay?

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Next up, we're spotlighting a rookie you should
keep an eye out for in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober debuted just the other day, and as
an up-and-comer of the Mejiro family, it's no
surprise she's already gaining attention...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not long before the world pins Dober as the
Mejiro family's new hope. We'll have to work even
harder to meet their expectations!
